Node.js vendor copy

This folder contains node.exe v24.14.1 copied from:
C:\Program Files\nodejs\node.exe

The desktop app uses this runtime to run the bundled Next.js standalone server with the same Node ABI used during local verification.

Project: https://nodejs.org/
License: MIT license and bundled third-party notices from the Node.js project.

For broader redistribution, keep the matching Node.js license information with the app.
